creator: ccowart@rescomp.berkeley.edu
text:
I'm having an issue with the same Intel SATA controller being unable to
detect my harddrive. It works great on 6.2, but I get a mountroot prompt
just as this PR describes on 7.0 RELEASE. 

My kernel configuration is:

include         GENERIC
ident           AUX_DEV
options         IPSEC
options         IPSEC_FILTERTUNNEL
device          crypto
options         QUOTA
options         IPFIREWALL
options         IPFIREWALL_VERBOSE
options         IPFIREWALL_VERBOSE_LIMIT=100
options         IPFIREWALL_FORWARD
options         DUMMYNET
options         IPDIVERT
options         HZ=1000
device          carp

The 6.2 kernel is the same (except we have IPSEC_ESP and no crypto device
for the old IPSec implementation).

Please let me know if I can provide any information to help troubleshoot
this. Thanks!

Working configuration:
